summary_oneline: Add ComputerInteractionToolkit and ComputerAgent for vision-based browser automation using Gemini computer-use models with Playwright.

localization.role: Existing async Playwright driver — reusable browser backend for ComputerInteraction
Abstract browser driver interface with screenshot/click/navigate/fill methods
Tool builder that must be extended to emit types.Tool(computer_use=...) for computer-use models
Model enum — needs new entries for computer-use model strings
Base class for ComputerInteractionToolkit — auto-discovers async methods as tools
Base class for ComputerAgent — provides tool management, ReAct loop, agent_tools() override
Existing selector-based scraping toolkit — composable alongside ComputerInteraction

constraints.statement: GoogleGenAIClient._build_tools() currently only handles FunctionDeclaration-based tools, not types.ComputerUse
constraints.implication: Must extend _build_tools() to conditionally emit types.Tool(computer_use=...) when a ComputerUse configuration is present, without breaking existing FunctionDeclaration tools

constraints.statement: Computer-use model returns predefined FunctionCalls (click_at, navigate, etc.) that are NOT declared as FunctionDeclarations — they are implicit from ComputerUse tool type
constraints.implication: The tool result handling in GoogleGenAIClient must support FunctionResponseBlob (screenshot bytes) in addition to regular dict responses

constraints.statement: Reference implementation uses sync Playwright; AI-Parrot's existing PlaywrightDriver uses async Playwright
constraints.implication: ComputerInteraction must use async Playwright (matching AI-Parrot conventions) — cannot directly copy the reference sync implementation

constraints.statement: Computer-use coordinates are normalized 0-1000, denormalized to viewport size
Screenshots must be returned as FunctionResponseBlob(mime_type='image/png', data=bytes) in the function response
constraints.implication: The existing ToolResult model and GoogleGenAIClient response handling need extension for binary image data in function responses

constraints.statement: Thinking mode (ThinkingConfig(include_thoughts=True)) is required for computer-use models
constraints.implication: GoogleGenAIClient must auto-enable thinking for computer-use models, similar to existing _requires_thinking() for Gemini 2.5/3.x Pro

constraints.statement: AI-Parrot async-first convention: all public methods must be async, no blocking I/O in async contexts
constraints.implication: All ComputerInteraction methods and the agent loop must use async/await

whats_new.name: ComputerInteractionToolkit
whats_new.role: AbstractToolkit subclass wrapping Gemini computer-use predefined actions (click_at, type_text_at, navigate, scroll, etc.) plus screenshot/recording capabilities (screenshot, start_recording, stop_recording, start_tracing, stop_tracing, record_har, save_pdf) with async Playwright backend

whats_new.name: ComputerAgent
whats_new.role: Agent subclass configured for computer-use models (Gemini 2.5/3.x computer-use) with ComputerInteractionToolkit + optional WebScrapingToolkit

whats_new.name: AsyncComputerBackend (or ComputerBackend)
whats_new.role: Async adaptation of the Computer abstract interface from the reference repo, backed by existing PlaywrightDriver

whats_new.name: GoogleModel.GEMINI_COMPUTER_USE entries
whats_new.role: New model enum entries for gemini-2.5-computer-use-preview-10-2025 and gemini-3-flash-preview

whats_new.name: ComputerTask / LoopResult models
whats_new.role: Pydantic models for defining reusable task sequences and loop execution results (count-based, condition-based, data-driven loops)

whats_modified.change: Extend to detect ComputerUse configuration and emit types.Tool(computer_use=...) alongside FunctionDeclaration tools
Support FunctionResponseBlob (screenshot bytes) in function response construction for computer-use actions

non_goals: Modifying the existing WebScrapingToolkit or its selector-based approach
Adding support for Browserbase backend (can be added later)
Auto-detecting which model supports computer-use (explicit configuration)
Supporting non-browser computer-use environments (desktop, mobile apps)

patterns_to_follow.pattern: FileManagerToolkit pattern: static async methods with tool_prefix for namespacing
DriverRegistry pattern: register async Playwright backend via factory
ToolResult with images field for returning screenshot data

integration_risks.risk: google-genai SDK version may not include ComputerUse types
integration_risks.impact: Import errors at runtime if SDK is outdated
integration_risks.mitigation: Pin minimum SDK version, add try/except import with clear error message

integration_risks.risk: Screenshot memory bloat in long conversations
integration_risks.impact: Context window exhaustion and high token costs from PNG data
integration_risks.mitigation: Implement screenshot pruning (keep last N turns) as in reference implementation

integration_risks.risk: Coordinate denormalization precision across different viewport sizes
integration_risks.impact: Clicks may miss targets on non-standard viewports
integration_risks.mitigation: Use configurable viewport size with sensible defaults (1280x720), match reference 0-1000 normalization

confidence_map.reasoning: Directly read from the reference implementation source code

confidence_map.statement: Existing PlaywrightDriver (async) provides all browser primitives needed for computer-use actions
confidence_map.reasoning: PlaywrightDriver has click, fill, navigate, screenshot, scroll, hover — maps 1:1 to computer-use actions

confidence_map.statement: GoogleGenAIClient._build_tools() must be extended to support ComputerUse tool type
confidence_map.reasoning: Direct code read confirms only FunctionDeclaration is currently handled

confidence_map.statement: ComputerInteractionToolkit should follow AbstractToolkit pattern with tool_prefix='computer'
confidence_map.reasoning: Consistent with FileManagerToolkit and JiraToolkit patterns

confidence_map.statement: FunctionResponse must include FunctionResponseBlob with PNG screenshot bytes for computer-use actions
confidence_map.reasoning: Directly read from reference implementation — this is the API contract

confidence_map.statement: WebScrapingToolkit extraction tools can complement ComputerInteraction for structured data extraction
confidence_map.reasoning: Both toolkits operate on Playwright but use different targeting (selectors vs coordinates) — composition is reasonable but untested

confidence_map.statement: The google-genai SDK in AI-Parrot's dependencies includes ComputerUse types
confidence_map.reasoning: Reference repo uses these types, but AI-Parrot's pinned SDK version may be older — needs verification

unknowns.question: Should the ComputerInteractionToolkit be placed in parrot/tools/ (core) or packages/ai-parrot-tools/src/parrot_tools/ (satellite package)?
plausible_answers: parrot_tools/ (satellite) alongside WebScrapingToolkit — keeps core lightweight
parrot/tools/ (core) — since it requires Google client changes that live in core

unknowns.question: Should ComputerAgent support safety_decision confirmations (the reference implementation prompts the user for confirmation on sensitive actions)?
plausible_answers: Yes — implement safety confirmation via agent event hooks
No — auto-acknowledge for autonomous operation, log the decision
Configurable — default to auto-acknowledge with option for interactive confirmation

recommended_next_command.rationale: Localization is high-confidence across all components (C1-C5 all high). The scope is well-defined with clear integration points. Multiple tasks will be needed (toolkit, agent, client changes, models) making this suitable for full spec + task decomposition.
